title: Chatbot Conversation for a Customer Service Scenario
scenario: Simulate a chat between a customer service chatbot and a user who wants to return a defective product. The chat should cover the return process, refund options, and product replacement.
constraints: Must include at least 3 return process steps
Use a customer-friendly and solution-oriented tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the chat includes accurate and helpful return process steps.
Verify that the tone is customer-friendly and solution-oriented throughout the chat.
Assess if the chat covers the refund and replacement options for the defective product.
